inputs.label: Active cancer (treatment or palliation within 6 months)
inputs.businessContext: 1 point if active cancer (excluding skin cancers), else 0

label_i18n.tr: Active cancer (treatment or palliation within 6 months)
label_i18n.de: Active cancer (treatment or palliation within 6 months)

label_i18n.es: Active cancer (treatment or palliation within 6 months)

inputs.label: Paralysis, paresis, or recent plaster immobilization of the lower extremity

label_i18n.en: Paralysis, paresis, or recent plaster immobilization of the lower extremity
label_i18n.tr: Paralysis, paresis, or recent plaster immobilization of the lower extremity
label_i18n.de: Paralysis, paresis, or recent plaster immobilization of the lower extremity

inputs.label: Recently bedridden >3 days or major surgery within 4 weeks

label_i18n.en: Recently bedridden >3 days or major surgery within 4 weeks
label_i18n.tr: Recently bedridden >3 days or major surgery within 4 weeks
label_i18n.de: Recently bedridden >3 days or major surgery within 4 weeks

inputs.label: Localized tenderness along the distribution of the deep veins
inputs.businessContext: 1 point if present (e.g., calf, thigh, popliteal fossa), else 0

label_i18n.en: Localized tenderness along the distribution of the deep veins
label_i18n.tr: Localized tenderness along the distribution of the deep veins
label_i18n.de: Localized tenderness along the distribution of the deep veins
label_i18n.fr: Localized tenderness along the distribution of the deep veins
label_i18n.es: Localized tenderness along the distribution of the deep veins
label_i18n.ar: Localized tenderness along the distribution of the deep veins

inputs.label: Entire leg swollen
inputs.businessContext: 1 point if the whole leg is swollen compared to the asymptomatic side, else 0

inputs.label: Calf swelling >3 cm compared to asymptomatic leg
inputs.businessContext: 1 point if measured difference is >3 cm at 10 cm below tibial tuberosity, else 0

label_i18n.en: Calf swelling >3 cm compared to asymptomatic leg
label_i18n.tr: Calf swelling >3 cm compared to asymptomatic leg
label_i18n.de: Calf swelling >3 cm compared to asymptomatic leg
label_i18n.fr: Calf swelling >3 cm compared to asymptomatic leg
label_i18n.es: Calf swelling >3 cm compared to asymptomatic leg
label_i18n.ar: Calf swelling >3 cm compared to asymptomatic leg

inputs.label: Pitting edema confined to the symptomatic leg
inputs.businessContext: 1 point if edema is greater in the symptomatic leg, else 0

label_i18n.en: Pitting edema confined to the symptomatic leg
label_i18n.tr: Pitting edema confined to the symptomatic leg
label_i18n.de: Pitting edema confined to the symptomatic leg
label_i18n.fr: Pitting edema confined to the symptomatic leg
label_i18n.es: Pitting edema confined to the symptomatic leg
label_i18n.ar: Pitting edema confined to the symptomatic leg

inputs.label: Alternative diagnosis as likely or more likely than DVT
inputs.businessContext: If alternative diagnosis is at least as plausible, subtract 2 points (enter -2); else 0

label_i18n.en: Alternative diagnosis as likely or more likely than DVT
label_i18n.tr: Alternative diagnosis as likely or more likely than DVT
label_i18n.de: Alternative diagnosis as likely or more likely than DVT
label_i18n.fr: Alternative diagnosis as likely or more likely than DVT
label_i18n.es: Alternative diagnosis as likely or more likely than DVT
label_i18n.ar: Alternative diagnosis as likely or more likely than DVT

formulas.totalScore: activeCancer + paralysis + surgeryOrBedridden + tendernessAlongVeins + entireLegSwollen + calfSwellingOver3cm + pittingEdema + alternativeDiagnosis
formulas.totalScore_aux: activeCancer + paralysis + surgeryOrBedridden + tendernessAlongVeins + entireLegSwollen + calfSwellingOver3cm + pittingEdema + alternativeDiagnosis
